title: List MySQL Users on Mittwald
description: List MySQL database users on Mittwald hosting.
prompt: I need to check the database users on my Mittwald MySQL database. Use the Mittwald MCP tools to list the databases in project p-ucvxdj, then list the users for the 'PHP App Database' (mysql_u6ig4z).

I need to set up a database user for our reporting tool. It should only be able to read data, not modify it. Can you create a read-only MySQL user for our production database? Use the available Mittwald MCP tools to complete this - discover any needed information yourself and make reasonable choices for parameters I didn't specify. Do not ask me questions - just use the tools to get it done.

questionAnswers.answer: Use the PHP App Database (mysql_u6ig4z) in project p-ucvxdj
